entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: An important legume crop of the semi-arid tropics, scientifically known as Cajanus cajan L.Millsp.

entities.name: PEST RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant genotype to resist attack by insect pests.

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BREEDING
entities.description: Traditional breeding methods used to produce pest-resistant genotypes.

entities.name: CRY1AB GENE
entities.description: A synthetic gene derived from Bacillus thuringiensis used to confer insect resistance.

entities.name: BACILLUS THURINGIENSIS
entities.description: The soil bacterium that is the source of the cry1Ab gene.

entities.name: AGROBACTERIUM TUMEFACIENS
entities.description: The bacterium used as a vector to mediate the genetic transformation of pigeonpea.

entities.name: AGROBACTERIUM-MEDIATED TRANSFORMATION
entities.description: A genetic engineering method used to incorporate the cry1Ab gene into the pigeonpea genome.

entities.name: TISSUE CULTURE
entities.description: A protocol for the direct regeneration of adventitious shoot buds in vitro from germinating seedlings.

entities.name: N6-BENZYLADENINE
entities.description: A plant growth regulator used in the culture medium to suppress axillary and primary shoot buds.

entities.name: BINARY VECTOR
entities.description: A DNA molecule used to carry the synthetic cry1Ab gene into the host plant.

entities.name: CAMV 35S PROMOTER
entities.description: A promoter used to drive the expression of the cry1Ab gene in transgenic plants.

entities.name: POLYMERASE CHAIN REACTION
entities.description: A molecular technique used for the initial screening of gene integration in transgenic events.

entities.name: REVERSE TRANSCRIPTION-POLYMERASE CHAIN REACTION
entities.description: A technique used to analyze the transcription of the introduced cry1Ab gene.

entities.name: ENZYME-LINKED IMMUNOSORBENT ASSAY
entities.description: A biochemical method used to estimate the content of Cry1Ab protein in various plant tissues.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The geographic region where pigeonpea is a significant crop.

entities.name: INSECT PESTS
entities.description: The target organisms that the transgenic pigeonpea is designed to resist.

entities.name: MENDELIAN RATIO
entities.description: The pattern of gene inheritance observed in the progenies of the independent transformants.
